judge_result.short_rationale: Answer matches the canonical eye-exposure sequence: flush eyes with eyelids open, remove contact lenses, continue flushing for at least 15 minutes or until told to stop, do not stop early, and seek immediate medical attention after flushing starts. It is concise, urgent, and fully grounded.
